name: EC2 Instances Use IAM Instance Profiles
description: EC2 instances should use IAM instance profiles/roles for AWS API access instead of embedded access keys, which are harder to rotate and audit
remediation: Attach an IAM instance profile to the EC2 instance and remove any hardcoded credentials from the instance
remediation_steps: Create an IAM role with the necessary permissions
Create an instance profile and add the role to it
Attach the instance profile to the EC2 instance
Update application code to use the SDK's default credential provider
Remove any hardcoded access keys from the instance
